Kit contains 20 clip/pin style badge holders, 3 sheets of 150gsm card each with 8 perforated name badges
Ideal for seminars, meetings, trade fairs, conferencing and training sessions
Customise your print design and import your contacts with Avery FREE Design & Print online software. Also compatible with Microsoft® Word templates
Suitable for laser and inkjet printers and copiers
Card refills are available in Avery Name Badge Refills 947002
Description
Make an impression and give your brand visibility at your next event or conference with Avery Printable Name Badges. These name badge kits include card inserts and PVC-free badge holders with two options for securing the badges to clothing. They can be attached either by a clip or by a pin. The sheets of white perforated card can be customised for your event with the attendees’ names and your brand logo and text. And once your event is over, the holders with the clip/pin attachment can be reused time and time again.
Our name badge kits come with 20 name badge holders and 24 card inserts in a size of 86.5 x 55.5mm with 8 cards per sheet and 3 sheets per pack. Print as many as you need, when you need them, using your laser or inkjet printer.
For a complete professional look, customise your print design from a range of pre-designed templates or create your own name badges from scratch with our FREE easy-to-use online software, Avery Design & Print. Import data such as your attendees’ names, your company logo or special messages in no time at all.
With no effort at all, you can organise an event and create a coordinated look with Avery. In addition to these name badges, the range includes a selection of delegate cards, labels for branding giveaways and cards for creating agendas, invitations, menu cards and more.
